prompt: Write a handbook for the context-injection system at /Users/jp/Projects/active/claude-code-tool-dev/packages/plugins/cross-model/context-injection/. This is the vendored MCP server within the cross-model plugin. Explore the system thoroughly, then write a complete operational handbook covering bring-up, component runbooks, failure modes, and verification.

assertions.name: handbook_file_exists
assertions.description: HANDBOOK.md exists in with_skill/outputs/ and has at least 1000 characters of content

assertions.name: has_overview_section
assertions.description: The handbook has an Overview or introduction section that describes the system's purpose

assertions.name: covers_both_mcp_tools
assertions.description: The handbook mentions both execute_scout and process_turn (the two main MCP tool entrypoints)

assertions.name: has_failure_modes_table
assertions.description: The handbook contains at least one table with symptom/cause/recovery columns (or equivalent failure mode documentation)

assertions.name: has_verification_section
assertions.description: The handbook includes a numbered verification or smoke test procedure an operator can actually run
